'''Xakrea''' was a major [[City/Legends|city]] located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Darkknell/Legends|Darkknell]]. It was the capital of the [[Daimanate]] during the [[Republic Dark Age]] and contained the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Daiman]]'s [[Sanctum Celestial]], his palace. During the [[Battle of Darkknell]], it was flooded and damaged by an artificial global flood unleashed by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] crime lord [[Zodoh]]'s [[Stormdriver]]s.<ref name="Deluge 5">[[Knight Errant: Deluge 5|''Knight Errant: Deluge'' 5]]</ref>
